router.title: Router
router.offline: Can't reach router {{name}}. Check that it's online.

setup.title: Set up {{name}}
setup.intro: Tap the button below to finish the router's first-time setup in one step.

error.mint_failed: Failed to get a connection credential. Check your network and try again.
error.key_failed: Failed to get a control key. Check your network and try again.
error.push_failed: Failed to push the configuration to the router. Check that it's online.

settings.title: Router Settings
settings.unbindConfirmBody: After unbinding, this app will no longer be able to control the router. You'll need to set it up again to use it.

exclusion.title: Connect both tunnels?
exclusion.bodyRouter: Your device's VPN is already connected. Continuing will route traffic through both tunnels at once — we recommend disconnecting the local VPN first.
exclusion.bodyDashboard: The router on this network is already protecting your traffic. Continuing will route traffic through both tunnels at once — we recommend disconnecting the router first.

takeover.banner: The router on this network is protecting your traffic
